topic: My hung towel is damp and warm every morning, though I only shower at night.
title: My Towel Was Warm Every Morning | True Scary Story

scenes.narration: My hung towel was damp and warm every morning, though I shower at night.
scenes.image_prompt: A bath towel hanging on a hook with a faint wet sheen, dim bathroom light, deep shadow, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: My bathroom was small, one hook beside the tub.
scenes.image_prompt: A narrow bathroom with a single towel hook near a bathtub, frosted window, low gray light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I always showered at night. The towel dried by dawn.
scenes.image_prompt: A folded dry towel on a hook beside an empty tub, faint morning light, soft shadow, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: But each morning it hung heavy, warm, freshly soaked.
scenes.image_prompt: A drooping damp towel on a hook with water darkening the fabric, dim light, deep shadow, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I pressed my hand to it. Body warm.
scenes.image_prompt: A hand resting flat against a damp hanging towel, faint wet patches, low warm light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: The tub was dry. Only the towel had been used.
scenes.image_prompt: A bone dry empty bathtub beside a soaked towel on the wall hook, cold dim light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I swapped it for a fresh towel and locked the door.
scenes.image_prompt: A crisp folded dry towel on a hook in a tidy bathroom, the door closed behind, dim light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Morning came. The fresh towel hung damp and warm.
scenes.image_prompt: A new towel sagging wet on a hook, droplets at the hem, low light, deep shadow, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: It smelled of soap I had never bought.
scenes.image_prompt: A bar of unfamiliar soap on a tub edge beside a damp towel, dim warm light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: One dawn the towel still dripped, and the floor held wet footprints.
scenes.image_prompt: Wet bare footprints leading from a tub across pale bathroom tile toward the door, dim light, deep shadow, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I started taking the towel to bed with me.
scenes.image_prompt: A folded towel resting on a rumpled bed in dim light, a dark doorway beyond, deep shadow, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: By morning it was gone, hanging warm in the bathroom again.
scenes.image_prompt: A damp towel back on its bathroom hook, faint steam in the air, dim light, vertical 9:16 framing
